qladmin_manual_section: QLAdmin Help PDF p.827-828 (QuikLoan - Policy Loans); p.74-75 (Loan History); p.130-132 (Processing a Loan)
qladmin_field_names: MLOANBAL; MLOANACCR; MLOANINT; MLOANINTX; MLOANIDT; MLOANDATE; MLOANPRIN
qladmin_field_descriptions: MLOANBAL=Loan balance; MLOANACCR=Accrued interest; MLOANINT=Loan interest rate; MLOANINTX=A advance/R arrears; MLOANIDT=Interest paid to date; MLOANDATE=Loan balance date; MLOANPRIN=Loan principal
qladmin_semantic_interpretation: Recurring loan interest accrual/capitalization is policy-loan maintenance recorded in QuikLoan and Loan History (loan interest charged), not a claim event.
conflict_description: LifePRO 0412 capitalization routed to QUIKCLMS as repeated Surrendered claims (99) with zero MPAID; QLAdmin manual assigns loan interest/capitalization to QuikLoan/Loan History while QUIKCLMS is titled Death Claims and Claims Tab shows death claims and cash surrenders only after Policy Maintenance.
recommended_target_domain: QuikLoan + Policy Coverage loan summary + Loan History (accounting/policy-loan domain)
manual_citation_excerpt: Loan transactions include loans granted, loan payments, loan interest charged... Current loan information includes accrued interest, loan balance... Which tables are affected? QuikLoan Policy Loans (p.75). Any adjustment in loan balance will be recorded as capitalized interest on the loan (p.132).

current_pipeline_routing: claim_event_reconstructor FAMILY_GROUPS maps LOAN_INTEREST_OFFSET into SURRENDER_CLAIM; 60-day clustering creates annual claim headers
qladmin_manual_section: QLAdmin Help PDF p.44 (Claims Tab); p.48-51 (Claims Tab data fields); p.115-116 (Death Claim status workflow)
qladmin_field_names: Claims Tab: Number, Status, Death, Reported, Completed, Paid, Net Payment; QUIKCLMS.CLAIMSTAT; QUIKCLMS.DTOFDEATH
qladmin_field_descriptions: Claims Tab displays pending/finalized death claims, cash surrenders, or health claims. Death claim statuses: Pending, Paid in Full, Settled, Denied. CLAIMSTAT 99=Surrenders.
qladmin_semantic_interpretation: Claims Tab entries represent discrete claim/surrender events with benefit settlement semantics, not recurring internal loan ledger postings on active policies.
conflict_description: Eight annual zero-payment Surrendered rows on an active policy contradict Claims Tab intent (finalized claim/surrender with net payment/disbursement lifecycle). No QUIKCLMP payee rows exist.
recommended_target_domain: Exclude from claims; if retained for audit use Policy Exhibit/Transaction Audit not QUIKCLMS
manual_citation_excerpt: Claims Tab - Displays all death claim and surrender data for a life policy (p.44). All pending and finalized death claims, cash surrenders, or health claim details will be displayed in the Claims Tab (p.48).

lifepro_source_pattern: 0412 amounts mapped to QUIKCLMS.MINTAMT via interest_amount
qladmin_manual_section: QLAdmin Help PDF p.733-734 (QuikClms field dictionary); p.115-116 (Death Claim Calculate/Reviews)
qladmin_field_descriptions: MINTAMT=Amount of interest earned; MHOLDINT=Interest earned on held payment; used in death claim benefit calculation context.
qladmin_semantic_interpretation: QUIKCLMS.MINTAMT is claim-benefit interest earned (e.g., interest on death benefit / held claim payments), not policy-loan capitalization posted to loan balance.

recommended_target_domain: QuikLoan.MLOANACCR and Coverage Tab Accrued Int / Loan Balance
manual_citation_excerpt: MINTAMT - Amount of interest earned (QuikClms - Death Claims, p.733). If paying interest on a death claim, the Interest on Death Claims account must be set up (p.115).
